title: polygala longifolia
intro: Polygala longifolia, also known as Fengmi or Polygala root, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Polygala longifolia include its potential to improve kidney function, treat diabetes, and boost the immune system. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
